gates.name: pooled_pass_bar
gates.threshold: PF>=1.2, Sharpe>=0.5, n>=40, expectancy>0 after costs, |DD|<=0.25 every fold

gates.name: fold_utility_positive
gates.threshold: U_f > 0 in >=3/4 folds, n>=8 per fold

gates.name: pass_bar_at_stress_slippage
gates.threshold: PASS_BAR holds at total per-side slippage 0.0020

gates.name: track_b_floor
gates.threshold: Track B pooled ret>0, |DD|<=0.30; DURABLE_CLAIM requires full PASS_BAR on Track B

gates.name: regime_slices
gates.threshold: expectancy>0 in >=2/3 regime slices, no slice |DD|>0.25

gates.name: direction_hit
gates.threshold: hit@5d > 50% with binomial p <= 0.10 and expectancy > 0

gates.name: source_scan_and_wf
gates.threshold: auditor source scan clean (no fail/block) and walk-forward stitched
